sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4789" key="*)alfitw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀλφῐτώ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦς</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bugbear</tr_> with which nurses frightened children, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
